$curated: Per-state BODY node set for game-recall — the keyed body MxCard nodes the FE renders in each state (appbar / screen / progress chrome + reveal/forgot/remembered controls excluded, matching review.states.json). Curated from game-recall.states.skeleton.json (gen_states.mjs). Cross-checked by game_recall_parity_test.dart, which drives before-reveal (term only, meaning absent — recall_game.dart renders meaning only when _revealed) and revealed (term + meaning, after tapping reveal). `forgot` / `remembered` render the SAME node-set as `revealed` (the FE grades then immediately returns to before-reveal via setState(_revealed=false) — no distinct feedback-banner state), so they are listed for completeness but NOT driven (documented coverage gap, like review's editing/audio). `complete` is NOT listed: it is rendered by the shared GameScreen._complete() in an unkeyed MxContentBounds (uses gamePlayAgain/gameDone, not the kit's keyed game-recall/next), so there is no keyed game-recall/* MxCard there.
